```{=html}
<div id="practice-timer-2" class="practice-timer">
 <span class="pt-main" role="button" tabindex="0" title="Start / pause">
  <span class="pt-ico pt-ico-play"><i data-lucide="play" style="width:1em;height:1em;"></i></span>
  <span class="pt-ico pt-ico-pause"><i data-lucide="pause" style="width:1em;height:1em;"></i></span>
  <span class="pt-time">10:00</span>
 </span>
 <button class="pt-reset" type="button" title="Reset" aria-label="Reset timer"><i data-lucide="rotate-ccw" style="width:1em;height:1em;"></i></button>
</div>

<input type="range" id="practice-scrub-2" class="practice-scrub" min="0" max="600" step="1" value="600" aria-label="Countdown scrubber" />

<div style="width:92%;margin:0 auto;text-align:left;">

 <div style="background:rgba(255,184,77,0.08);border-left:6px solid #FFB84D;border-radius:0 16px 16px 0;padding:1.7em 2.1em 1.8em;">

  <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.82em;color:#FFB84D;letter-spacing:0.2em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:0.55em;">— practice 02 —</div>

  <div style="font-size:0.85em;font-weight:800;color:#F8F7F0;line-height:1.15;margin-bottom:1em;letter-spacing:-0.01em;white-space:nowrap;">
   Build a one-page bio site.
  </div>

  <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,minmax(0,1fr));gap:0.8em;">

   <div style="background:rgba(248,247,240,0.04);border:1px solid rgba(255,184,77,0.2);border-radius:12px;padding:0.7em 0.85em;">
    <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#FFB84D;letter-spacing:0.16em;margin-bottom:0.4em;">STEP 01</div>
    <div style="font-size:0.55em;color:#F8F7F0;line-height:1.5;">Make a folder, open it in Positron, launch <code style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.95em;color:#FFB84D;">claude</code>.</div>
   </div>

   <div style="background:rgba(248,247,240,0.04);border:1px solid rgba(255,184,77,0.2);border-radius:12px;padding:0.7em 0.85em;">
    <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#FFB84D;letter-spacing:0.16em;margin-bottom:0.4em;">STEP 02</div>
    <div style="font-size:0.55em;color:#F8F7F0;line-height:1.5;">Ask for a one-page HTML bio — yourself or a movie star.</div>
   </div>

   <div style="background:rgba(248,247,240,0.04);border:1px solid rgba(255,184,77,0.2);border-radius:12px;padding:0.7em 0.85em;">
    <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#FFB84D;letter-spacing:0.16em;margin-bottom:0.4em;">STEP 03</div>
    <div style="font-size:0.55em;color:#F8F7F0;line-height:1.5;">Open <code style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.95em;color:#FFB84D;">index.html</code> in the browser. Iterate once.</div>
   </div>

  </div>

 </div>

</div>

<script>
(function(){
  function init(){
    var el = document.getElementById('practice-timer-2');
    if(!el || el.dataset.wired) return;
    el.dataset.wired = '1';
    var main = el.querySelector('.pt-main');
    var resetBtn = el.querySelector('.pt-reset');
    var display = el.querySelector('.pt-time');
    var scrub = document.getElementById('practice-scrub-2');
    var TOTAL = 600, STEP = 1, WARN = 60, SCRUB_STEP = 5;
    var remaining = TOTAL, id = null, dragging = false, audioCtx = null, pressing = false;
    function ensureAudio(){
      if(!audioCtx){ try { audioCtx = new (window.AudioContext || window.webkitAudioContext)(); } catch(e){ audioCtx = null; } }
      if(audioCtx && audioCtx.state === 'suspended'){ audioCtx.resume(); }
    }
    function chime(){
      if(!audioCtx) return;
      var now = audioCtx.currentTime;
      [880, 1108.73, 1318.51].forEach(function(f, i){
        var o = audioCtx.createOscillator(), g = audioCtx.createGain();
        o.type = 'sine'; o.frequency.value = f;
        o.connect(g); g.connect(audioCtx.destination);
        var t = now + i * 0.18;
        g.gain.setValueAtTime(0.0001, t);
        g.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(0.3, t + 0.02);
        g.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(0.0001, t + 0.5);
        o.start(t); o.stop(t + 0.55);
      });
    }
    function fmt(s){ var m = Math.floor(s/60), x = s % 60; return m + ':' + (x < 10 ? '0' : '') + x; }
    function render(){
      display.textContent = fmt(remaining);
      el.classList.toggle('pt-warning', remaining <= WARN && remaining > 0);
      if(scrub){ scrub.style.setProperty('--fill', (remaining / TOTAL * 100) + '%'); if(!dragging) scrub.value = remaining; }
    }
    function showScrub(v){ if(scrub) scrub.classList.toggle('pt-visible', v); }
    function stop(){ if(id){ clearInterval(id); id = null; } el.classList.remove('pt-running'); showScrub(false); }
    function tick(){
      if(pressing) return; // hold the display steady while the button is pressed; act on release like play/reset
      remaining -= STEP;
      if(remaining <= 0){ remaining = 0; render(); stop(); el.classList.add('pt-done'); chime(); return; }
      render();
    }
    function start(){
      if(id) return;
      ensureAudio();
      if(remaining <= 0){ remaining = TOTAL; el.classList.remove('pt-done'); render(); }
      id = setInterval(tick, STEP * 1000);
      el.classList.remove('pt-paused');
      el.classList.add('pt-running');
      showScrub(true);
    }
    function toggle(){ if(id){ stop(); el.classList.add('pt-paused'); } else { start(); } }
    function reset(){ stop(); remaining = TOTAL; el.classList.remove('pt-done'); el.classList.remove('pt-paused'); render(); }
    main.addEventListener('click', toggle);
    main.addEventListener('keydown', function(e){ if(e.key === 'Enter' || e.key === ' '){ e.preventDefault(); toggle(); } });
    main.addEventListener('pointerdown', function(){ pressing = true; });
    main.addEventListener('pointerup', function(){ pressing = false; });
    main.addEventListener('pointerleave', function(){ pressing = false; });
    main.addEventListener('pointercancel', function(){ pressing = false; });
    resetBtn.addEventListener('click', function(e){ e.stopPropagation(); reset(); });
    if(scrub){
      scrub.addEventListener('input', function(){ dragging = true; remaining = Math.round((parseInt(scrub.value, 10) || 0) / SCRUB_STEP) * SCRUB_STEP; scrub.value = remaining; if(remaining > 0) el.classList.remove('pt-done'); render(); });
      scrub.addEventListener('change', function(){ dragging = false; });
    }
    render();
  }
  if(document.readyState === 'loading') document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', init); else init();
})();
</script>
```
